source_pr.title: test: stable global var test
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #16598, close #16636 

Problem Summary:
The results may not be stable if the input function executes very fast

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
Add some sleep in the input function, so the key may not be deleted too soon and other goroutines could be scheduled

How it Works:

### Related changes


- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


Side effects



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

symptoms: PR title: stable global var test.
failure_signature: PR title: stable global var test.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to leaked global/shared state between tests. Global state must be reset/restored between tests. This PR stabilizes it by: test: stable global var test.

evidence: evidence: PR title: stable global var test.
evidence: makes testGVCSuite SerialSuites and restructures TestConcurrentOneFlight to synchronize start and avoid domain/global side effects (domain/global_vars_cache_test.go).
